name: Hydration Habit Tuner
description: Build a simple daily water habit around the user's schedule using personalized cues, a bottle plan, and a 7-day check-in sheet.
use_cases: Identify dry spells in a user's normal day pattern.
Create hydration cues tied to existing routines rather than constant alarms.
Choose a practical bottle or container plan.
Provide a 7-day check-in sheet for reviewing the habit.
